evals.name: expert1-basic-prompt
evals.prompt: 生成一个猫咪在窗台上晒太阳的AI绘画提示词

assertions.name: 输出JSON格式
assertions.expected: output must be valid JSON array

assertions.name: 包含必需字段
assertions.expected: JSON must contain cn, en, cn-tag, en-tag fields

assertions.name: 无额外文字
assertions.expected: Output should only contain JSON, no extra text

evals.name: expert2-professional-prompt
evals.prompt: 使用生成提示词2：一位厨师在开放式厨房里烹饪美食，专业摄影风格
evals.expected_output: JSON格式，包含相机参数描述

assertions.name: 包含相机参数
assertions.expected: Should include camera model and settings

assertions.name: 输出JSON格式
assertions.expected: Output must be valid JSON array

evals.name: text-to-video
evals.prompt: 生成一个5秒视频的提示词：海浪拍打沙滩，夕阳西下
evals.expected_output: 完整的一段话，500字以内，包含主体、运动、场景、镜头、光影、氛围

assertions.name: 包含必需要素
assertions.expected: Should include all required video elements

evals.name: simple-translation
evals.prompt: 把'A beautiful sunset over the ocean'翻译成中文
evals.expected_output: 仅翻译结果，无额外说明

assertions.name: 无确认语
assertions.expected: Should not include words like '好的' or '为您翻译'

evals.name: mode-detection-midjourney
evals.prompt: 帮我优化这个Midjourney提示词：a cat in space
evals.expected_output: 应识别为Expert 1模式，输出JSON格式提示词

assertions.name: 正确识别模式
assertions.expected: Should use Expert 1 mode for general image generation

assertions.name: 扩展原描述
assertions.expected: Should expand and enhance the original prompt
